view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom reminder schedule.

blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom reminder schedule.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom reminder schedule.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence does not provide concrete API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate the implementation of the custom reminder schedule (24h, 1h, 15min before). While the linked use case includes examples of reminder messages, it lacks the necessary details to confirm that these reminders can be triggered as specified. Therefore, the requirement cannot be validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
